entries.title: FDIC Plans to Block Stablecoins From Pass-Through Insurance
entries.snippet: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) plans to propose rules saying that stablecoins are not eligible for FDIC pass-through insurance, and that tokenized deposits are eligible for such insurance. FDIC Chairman Travis Hill said this on Wednesday (March 11) in a speech delivered at the Amer
entries.tweet_text:
Will the FDIC's push to recognize tokenized deposits while blocking stablecoin insurance reshape digital asset regulation?

Watch for implementation timelines—this could accelerate institutional adoption of on-chain banking infrastructure.

entries.title: FDIC chair says no deposit insurance for stablecoins under GENIUS Act
entries.snippet: A proposed plan by the agency would ban “pass-through insurance“ for stablecoins by third parties in addition to the FDIC not insuring deposits under the law.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: FDIC chair moves to block deposit insurance for stablecoins under proposed GENIUS Act, including third-party pass-through coverage.

Stablecoin issuers lose a key competitive advantage against traditional banking.

entries.title: Tokenized Securities Move Closer to Mainstream Finance After New Guidance
entries.snippet: Innovation versus regulation is no longer the defining framework of the blockchain finance space. Instead, as a Thursday (March 5) technical clarification issued jointly by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency, the Federal Reserve and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. revealed, the tradit
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: U.S. banking regulators jointly clarify tokenized securities guidance, signaling institutional-grade support for on-chain assets.

The regulatory green light accelerates RWA adoption across traditional finance institutions seeking blockchain infrastructure.

entries.title: First spot Polkadot ETF launches in US issued by 21Shares
entries.snippet: THE BLOCK: First spot Polkadot ETF launches in US issued by 21Shares

entries.title: Mastercard pilots agentic transactions in Malaysia
entries.snippet: Mastercard today announced the completion of a pilot that delivered its first authenticated agentic transactions in Malaysia, marking a major step forward for trusted AI‑powered commerce.
entries.tweet_text: Mastercard pilots agentic transactions in Malaysia

entries.title: Ondo Finance RWAs on 1inch surpass $2.5 billion in volume since September 2025
entries.snippet: 1inch (@1inch): 🔁 @OndoFinance RWAs on 1inch surpassed $2.5 billion in volume since September 2025. Tokenized Nvidia, Tesla, and Google stocks and commodity-linked tokens (Silver) now traded on-chain through DeFi infrastructure. BNB Chain leads in volume, transactions, and active users.

entries.title: Pakistan parliament passes Virtual Assets Act formalizing crypto regulatory authority
entries.snippet: Pakistan passed the Virtual Assets Act, establishing a statutory digital asset regulator and introducing criminal penalties nationwide.

entries.title: Elizabeth Warren blasts SEC over Justin Sun case, warns crypto bills must address Trump's 'crypto corruption'
entries.snippet: Sen. Warren slammed the SEC’s decision to drop its case against Tron founder Justin Sun after charges were dropped in a $10 million deal.

entries.title: Tokenized RWAs buck the slump as 1inch-Ondo volumes top $2.5B
entries.snippet: Trading in tokenized stocks and ETFs via 1inch’s Ondo integration has topped $2.5 billion, as real-world assets become one of the few reliable growth engines in a weak crypto market.
entries.tweet_text:
$2.5B in tokenized stock trading via @1inch and @Ondo_Finance signals RWAs are becoming crypto's most resilient asset class.

Watch whether traditional finance players begin integrating similar infrastructure as institutional demand for tokenized securities accelerates.

entries.title: Utexo Raises $7.5M Led by Tether to Launch Native USDT Settlements on Bitcoin
entries.snippet: CHAINWIRE: Utexo Raises $7.5M Led by Tether to Launch Native USDT Settlements on Bitcoin
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: @Tether_to backs $7.5M funding round for Utexo to enable native USDT settlements directly on Bitcoin.

Most missed the significance: this moves stablecoin infrastructure away from Layer 2s toward Bitcoin's base layer security.

entries.title: Bybit and Tether Launch "Golden Season" With $1M in Gold-Backed Rewards for Crypto Investors

entries.title: Ripple Introduces Integrated Stablecoin Platform to Transform Global Payments Landscape
entries.snippet: CROWDFUNDINSIDER: Ripple Introduces Integrated Stablecoin Platform to Transform Global Payments Landscape
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: @Ripple launches integrated stablecoin platform targeting enterprise cross-border payments at scale.

This directly challenges correspondent banking delays and FX friction—watch for enterprise adoption momentum in Q1.

entries.title: Introducing Jupiter Card: a fully integrated onchain card inside Jupiter Mobile
entries.snippet: Jupiter (@JupiterExchange): Introducing Jupiter Card: a fully integrated onchain card inside Jupiter Mobile. Built natively into Jupiter Mobile, use your wallet balance for spending: ✅Spend wherever Visa is accepted ✅Visa Infinite and Platinum virtual cards ✅1-1.8% FX on Card Spend ✅Funded by USDC,…
entries.tweet_text:
Jupiter just launched a native Visa card powered by USDC—spend stablecoin balances anywhere cards are accepted.

This is the infrastructure layer that could finally make crypto payments seamless at scale.

entries.title: Kazakhstan central bank to invest $350 million worth of gold, forex reserves into digital assets
entries.tweet_text: Kazakhstan central bank to invest $350 million worth of gold, forex reserves into digital assets

entries.title: Kraken rolls out unified execution layer for xStocks tokenized equities called xChange
entries.snippet: xChange is an onchain trading engine and unified execution layer for xStocks issued on Solana and Ethereum.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: @kaboracle launches xChange, a unified execution layer for tokenized equities across Solana and Ethereum.

This collapses fragmentation in on-chain stock trading—watch for institutional adoption to accelerate.

entries.title: Doppler token creation platform powering most Base launches expands to Solana
entries.snippet: THE BLOCK: Doppler token creation platform powering most Base launches expands to Solana
entries.tweet_text:
Doppler, the token platform behind most Base launches, is now live on Solana—signaling a major shift in where crypto projects choose to build.

Watch for acceleration in cross-chain token creation as infrastructure commoditizes.

entries.title: Stablecoin platform Liminal Custody surpasses $100 billion in on-chain transactions
entries.snippet: Liminal Custody today announced it has crossed $100 billion in total on-chain transaction volume processed through its digital asset infrastructure platform. This milestone encompasses nearly 5 million transactions across 20+ blockchains and reflects sustained platform resilience and consistent scal
entries.tweet_text:
Liminal Custody just quietly processed $100B in stablecoin transactions across 20+ blockchains—nearly invisible infrastructure powering the future of digital finance.

Most institutions still don't realize this plumbing layer exists. Watch who builds on it next.

entries.title: Utexo raises $7.5M to settle USDT on Bitcoin
entries.snippet: AXIOS: Exclusive: Utexo raises $7.5M to settle USDT on Bitcoin

entries.title: Bank of Canada, country's largest banks complete first tokenized bond trial
Kazakhstan's Central Bank Plans to Invest Up to $350 Million in Crypto-Related Assets
entries.snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to Reuters, Kazakhstan’s central bank plans to invest up to $350 million from its gold and foreign exchange reserves into crypto-related assets, including shares of crypto-linked tech firms and index funds, with the program expected to begin in April or May.

entries.title: OKX launches in-app social networking feature to reduce 'trust gap' among traders
entries.snippet: The crypto exchange said it will begin a phased rollout on March 6 to select users before broader availability.

entries.title: SEC Moves to Dismiss Civil Fraud Lawsuit Against Crypto Billionaire Justin Sun
entries.snippet: WSJ: The SEC moved to dismiss a civil fraud lawsuit it had filed against crypto billionaire Justin Sun, who became a major investor in Trump's crypto projects as he sought leniency from U.S. law enforcers.

entries.title: SEC Moves to Settle Justin Sun Case With $10M Penalty for BitTorrent Owner
entries.snippet: The judgment would resolve one of the agency’s highest-profile crypto enforcement actions and dismiss the remaining claims against Sun.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: SEC settles enforcement action against Tron founder Justin Sun with $10M penalty, resolving one of crypto's most closely watched cases.

This signals regulatory clarity on high-profile figures—watch for precedent-setting implications across the industry.

entries.title: SEC, Justin Sun reach settlement over Tron lawsuit
entries.snippet: COINDESK: SEC, Justin Sun reach settlement over Tron lawsuit
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: SEC settles Tron lawsuit with Justin Sun, signaling regulatory clarity on major crypto platforms.

Watch whether this opens the door for broader stablecoin adoption among institutional investors.

entries.title: Canadian government and TD Bank successfully pilot $100 million CAD bond issuance using Hyperledger Fabric tech
entries.snippet: THE BLOCK: Canadian government and TD Bank successfully pilot $100 million CAD bond issuance using Hyperledger Fabric tech
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: Canada's government and TD Bank just proved blockchain can handle $100M bond issuances on Hyperledger Fabric.

This signals institutional crypto infrastructure is ready for prime time—watch for other central banks to follow.

entries.title: Revolut seeks de novo banking charter with OCC
entries.snippet: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has recently given conditional approval to several stablecoin issuers to become banks.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: @RevolutApp is pursuing a de novo banking charter with the OCC, following the regulator's conditional approvals for stablecoin issuers to become banks.

This could reshape how fintech companies access traditional banking infrastructure and regulatory legitimacy.

entries.title: Exegy and Strands team on prediction market and digital asset data feed
entries.snippet: Exegy, the capital markets platform that links elite trading firms to the global venues where they transact, and Strands, the premier multi-asset execution and tokenization infrastructure provider, today announced the inclusion of real-time data from the Strands digital asset platform into the Exegy

entries.title: BitGo to provide infrastructure and support distribution for SoFi stablecoin
entries.snippet: BitGo Bank & Trust, N.A. (“BitGo Bank & Trust”), an OCC-regulated digital asset trust bank and subsidiary of BitGo Holdings, Inc. (“BitGo”) (NYSE: BTGO), today announces that they have been selected to provide stablecoin infrastructure services and support distribution for SoFiUSD, a U.S. dollar-peg
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: BitGo Bank & Trust selected to power stablecoin infrastructure and distribution for @SoFi's new USD-pegged token.

Regulated trust banks entering stablecoin ops signals mainstream institutional acceptance of digital currency rails.

entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: NYSE owner Intercontinental Exchange values @okx at $25B in strategic partnership, signaling major institutional backing for crypto trading infrastructure.

Watch whether this legitimizes crypto exchanges as core financial utilities in traditional finance's playbook.

entries.title: ZeroHash applies for national bank trust charter from OCC to issue stablecoins and custody digital assets
entries.snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): REGULATION: @zerohashx has applied for a national bank trust charter from the OCC to issue stablecoins and custody digital assets under a single federal framework.

entries.title: Trump's social media post on crypto bill 'not enough' to move legislation, TD Cowen says
entries.snippet: Trump's direct involvement is required, but it is hard to see that occurring while the U.S. is in armed conflict with Iran, TD said.
entries.tweet_text: Crypto advocates hoping Trump's social media endorsement moves legislation may be overlooking a critical detail: geopolitical crises have a way of reshaping Washington's priorities, even for the president's pet projects.

entries.title: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules
entries.snippet: Messari said weekly stablecoin inflows rose 414% to $1.7 billion as debate over yield-bearing stablecoins continued to stall US crypto market structure talks.
entries.tweet_text:
Stablecoin inflows surge 414% to $1.7B weekly as Washington gridlock on yield rules deepens regulatory uncertainty.

The debate could reshape how crypto assets compete with traditional money markets—watch whether yield-bearing designs win regulatory clarity.

entries.title: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter
entries.snippet: Several crypto companies have secured OCC conditional approval for a banking charter since the GENIUS Act was passed in July, including Circle, Ripple, Bridge and Stripe.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: Five crypto firms now hold OCC conditional approval for banking charters post-GENIUS Act—Circle, Ripple, Bridge, Stripe, and now Zerohash.

Watch whether stablecoin issuers can actually convert these approvals into full bank licenses.

entries.title: Sui joins stablecoin race with USDsui mainnet launch
entries.snippet: The core developer behind Sui designed the network to outperform other blockchains in terms of speed and scalability.
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: Sui launches USDsui stablecoin, leveraging its speed advantage to challenge entrenched players in the stablecoin market.

Watch whether Sui's scalability translates to real adoption versus competitors like USDC and USDT.

entries.title: SEC Crypto Rule Plan Under Review by White House, Notice Shows
entries.snippet: BLOOMBERG LAW: SEC Crypto Rule Plan Under Review by White House, Notice Shows
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: The White House is now reviewing the SEC's crypto regulatory framework, signaling potential policy shifts ahead.

This could reshape how traditional finance institutions approach digital asset compliance and market entry.

entries.title: Stablecoin giving grows as 'crypto philanthropy' matures: Report
entries.snippet: Fundraising platform Giving Block said it faciliated more than $100 million in donations of stablecoins to charities in 2025, a surge possibly aided by a change in US laws.

entries.title: U.S. Regulators Advancing Oversight of Crypto and Prediction Markets; SEC Submits Guidance on Securities Laws Application
entries.snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to Bloomberg, U.S. regulators are advancing oversight of crypto and prediction markets. The U.S. SEC has submitted commission-level guidance to the White House on the application of federal securities laws to certain crypto assets, potentially introducing a t
entries.tweet_text:
BREAKING: The SEC is submitting formal guidance to the White House on how federal securities laws apply to crypto assets and prediction markets.

Watch for potential regulatory framework that could reshape how digital assets are classified and traded.

entries.title: Zerohash seeks national trust bank charter from OCC
entries.snippet: The firm wants to be able to provide services like custody over digital assets, fiat currency, and other assets.

entries.title: Western Union teams with Crossmint to support USDPT stablecoin on Solana
entries.snippet: The infrastructure provider will support the planned launch of Western Union’s USDPT stablecoin on Solana, linking blockchain payments to its global payout network.

entries.title: Canada's Scotiabank launches multi-crypto ETF with 3iQ
entries.snippet: The bank's asset manager and 3iQ debut an actively managed crypto ETF to Canadian investors, offering exposure to Bitcoin, Ether, Solana and XRP at a competitive 0.25% fee.
